Description: BetterIcons is a modern, powerful property editor for Umbraco CMS that provides access to 200,000+ icons from popular icon libraries including Material Design Icons, Font Awesome, Bootstrap Icons, and 100+ more. Built with React for a smooth, responsive user experience with smart search, color customization, and zero configuration.
Title: BetterIcons for Umbraco

Screenshots.Caption: Browse and search 200,000+ icons with color customization
